nasb.text: You shall not follow the masses in doing evil, nor shall you testify in a dispute so as to turn aside after a multitude in order to pervert justice;

esv.text: You shall not fall in with the many to do evil, nor shall you bear witness in a lawsuit, siding with the many, so as to pervert justice,

cnv.text: 不可隨眾行惡，不可在訴訟的事上隨眾說歪曲正義的話；

ccb.text: 不可随众行恶。在法庭作证时不可附和多数人，颠倒是非。
